name: Document text
description: Makes scanned and binary documents searchable: OCR when the spool couldn't extract text, plus a machine summary annotation per document.
prompt: When new documents arrive, make them searchable. If a document has no extracted text (a scan, a photographed page), read its preview and transcribe the text you can see. When a document has text, write a one-paragraph summary. Store both as machine-attributed derived data; never touch what I wrote myself.

vault.why: Reads new documents' text/preview derivatives, transcribes scans and summarizes documents, and writes the results back as the text derivative (searchable) and a summary annotation (issue #299).
